why: Use Beyond Order for chosen burden and vocation; use 12 Rules for first-order discipline and anti-expedience grounding.
Use 12 Rules for immediate correction of self-contempt; use Maps of Meaning when shame marks deeper collapse of adaptation and identity.
Use Maps of Meaning for chaos/unknown structure; use Beyond Order for resentment, corruption, and rebuilding through burden.
Use Beyond Order for negotiation/romance maintenance; use 12 Rules for truthful speech and boundary-setting.
